# snark — Sarcasm as a Service

## Service Overview

**Stack**: Python 3.12+ | Django 5.1.4 | DRF | PostgreSQL | Redis
**Purpose**: Public AI humor API — every response uniquely generated by LLM
**Auth**: None — fully public, IP-based rate limiting only (50 req/hour)
**Port**: External 8100, Internal 8094
**Database**: snark | Redis DB 9
**License**: AGPL-3.0-or-later
**Repo**: https://github.com/PramodTKodag/snark

## Critical Rules

| Rule | Detail |
|------|--------|
| **No Auth** | Zero authentication. No JWT, no API keys. Public API only. |
| **Provider Pattern** | All AI calls go through the provider abstraction in `wit/providers/`. Never call AI SDKs directly in views/services. |
| **Provider Fallback** | `WitService._generate_with_fallback()` handles content filters and provider failures automatically. |
| **Rate Limiting** | 50 requests/hour per IP via DRF AnonRateThrottle. Every public endpoint MUST use it. |
| **Idempotent Seeds** | `seed_personas` uses `update_or_create` — safe to run on every startup. |
| **No Secrets in Code** | All API keys via environment variables. Use `decouple.config()`. |

## Architecture

```
snark/
├── base/           # Django config, no business logic
└── wit/
    ├── models.py       # Persona, ResponseLog
    ├── views.py        # 28 wit endpoints + 3 health endpoints
    ├── services.py     # WitService orchestrator (caching, anti-repetition, fallback)
    ├── serializers.py  # WitInputSerializer, WitResponseSerializer, HealthResponseSerializer
    ├── docs.py         # OpenAPI description constants per endpoint
    ├── urls.py         # All wit URL patterns
    ├── admin.py        # Django admin registration
    ├── providers/      # AI provider abstraction (Groq, Gemini, Claude)
    │   ├── base.py         # AIProvider interface, ProviderError, ContentFilterError
    │   ├── registry.py     # Provider registry with fallback ordering
    │   ├── groq_provider.py
    │   ├── gemini_provider.py
    │   └── claude_provider.py
    ├── management/     # seed_personas command
    └── tests/          # test_models, test_views, test_services, test_providers, test_seed_command
```

## Development

```bash
cp .env.example .env       # Add at least one AI provider API key
docker compose --profile dev up --build
# API available at http://localhost:8100/v1/wit/
# Swagger UI at http://localhost:8100/v1/wit/swagger/
```

## Make Targets

| Command | Action |
|---------|--------|
| `make test` | Run tests with pytest |
| `make test-cov` | Tests with coverage report |
| `make format` | Black + isort auto-format |
| `make lint` | Flake8 linting |
| `make migrate` | Run Django migrations |
| `make makemigrations` | Generate new migrations |
| `make seed` | Seed personas |
| `make shell` | Django interactive shell |
| `make up` | Start dev server |
| `make down` | Stop all containers |
| `make logs` | Tail container logs |

## Claude Code Slash Commands

| Command | What it does |
|---------|-------------|
| `/test` | Run the test suite, analyze failures |
| `/lint` | Format + lint the codebase |
| `/dev` | Start/stop the dev environment |
| `/health` | Check running service health |
| `/seed` | Seed database with personas |
| `/add-endpoint` | Scaffold a new wit endpoint (guided) |
| `/add-provider` | Add a new AI provider (guided) |
| `/review` | Review current code changes |
| `/try-endpoint` | Hit a live endpoint to test it |

## Key Patterns

### Adding a New Endpoint

Every wit endpoint follows the same 5-file pattern:

1. **`management/commands/seed_personas.py`** — Add persona with slug, prompt, rules, tone, temperature
2. **`docs.py`** — Add OpenAPI description constant
3. **`views.py`** — New `APIView` class with `AnonRateThrottle`, calls `WitService.generate()`
4. **`urls.py`** — Register the path
5. **`tests/`** — Add test cases

**Never** call AI SDKs (anthropic, groq, google-genai) directly in views. Always go through `WitService.generate(slug, user_input, ip)`.

### Adding a New Provider

1. **`providers/{name}_provider.py`** — Extend `AIProvider`, implement `generate()`
2. **`providers/registry.py`** — Register in fallback chain
3. **`providers/__init__.py`** — Export
4. **`providers/registry.py`** — Register the class in `PROVIDER_CLASSES` and add `<NAME>_MODEL` / key env var settings
5. **`.env.example`** — Document the API key env var

### WitService Flow

```
View → WitService.generate(slug, input, ip)
  → _load_persona(slug)          # cached 1hr
  → _response_cache_key()        # check 5min cache
  → _build_prompt(persona, mood) # system prompt + mood modifier
  → _generate_with_fallback()    # tries providers in order, handles ContentFilterError
  → ResponseLog.objects.create() # log to DB
  → cache.set()                  # cache response 5min
```

### Moods

Endpoints accept an optional `mood` parameter. Valid values:
`sarcastic`, `angry`, `funny`, `sad`, `excited`, `dramatic`, `passive-aggressive`, `philosophical`, `wholesome`, `unhinged`, `dry`, `chaotic`, `chill`, `spicy`, `deadpan`

## Testing

```bash
make test                                    # All tests
cd snark && python -m pytest -v -k test_name # Specific test
cd snark && python -m pytest --cov=wit       # With coverage
```

Tests use Django's test client. Provider tests mock the AI SDK calls. The `conftest.py` at `snark/conftest.py` sets up test fixtures.

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Required | Description |
|----------|----------|-------------|
| `SECRET_KEY` | Yes | Django secret key |
| `DEBUG` | No | `True` for local dev only |
| `AI_DEFAULT_PROVIDER` | Yes | `groq`, `gemini`, or `claude` |
| `AI_DEFAULT_MODEL` | Yes | Model name for the default provider |
| `GROQ_API_KEY` | If using groq | Free tier available |
| `GEMINI_API_KEY` | If using gemini | Free tier available |
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | If using claude | Paid |
| `POSTGRES_*` | Yes | Database connection |
| `REDIS_*` | Yes | Cache connection |

## Quick API Reference

| Endpoint | Method | Input | Description |
|----------|--------|-------|-------------|
| `/v1/wit/say-no/` | GET | — | Creative excuse to say no |
| `/v1/wit/roast/<name>/` | GET | URL param | Personalized roast |
